title: Xtra Dense Norwegian Yeast Dough Bake
description: A traditional Norwegian yeast dough bake featuring vanilla sugar and wok-hei, perfect for a lazy Sunday, this flexitarian-friendly dish is cooked to perfection in a claypot.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, yeast, vanilla sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the melted butter, eggs, and milk.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a claypot and brush the top with wok-hei oil.
Cover the claypot with a lid and let the dough rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Bake the dough in the preheated oven for 35 minutes or until it is golden brown.
Remove the claypot from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
